facebook.content: This Month's Kingdom Report is packed with game-changing insights on how to navigate the spiritual battles ahead. One key takeaway: the lines between good and evil are growing increasingly blurred in the realms of politics, finance, and entertainment - it's becoming harder to distinguish false light from true light. How are you cultivating discernment in your life to cut through the deception and stay aligned with Kingdom truth?
